outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire takes effect as US-Iran diplomacy continues
outlets.summary: CNN covers the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire taking effect at midnight Beirut time. Notes 8 killed in last strike after announcement. Hezbollah fired 10 rockets before ceasefire. House war powers vote failed 214-213.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Popes have spoken out on politics before. But with Trump and Pope Leo it is different
outlets.summary: NPR examines Trump-Pope Leo feud over Iran war. Pope denounced "delusion of omnipotence." Trump called Pope "weak on crime" and posted later-deleted Jesus-like image.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iran threatens to halt Red Sea traffic in response to US military blockade of ports
outlets.summary: Fox News reports IRGC Maj. Gen. Abdollahi threatens to block all shipping in Gulf, Sea of Oman, and Red Sea. Houthis echo threat. USS Bush CSG routing around Africa.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump says Israel, Lebanon agree to 10-day ceasefire as US enforces blockade
outlets.summary: Fox News live coverage of Lebanon ceasefire and CENTCOM blockade Day 4. 13 ships turned back. Pentagon ready to resume strikes if no deal.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: US House votes down latest effort to curtail Trump war powers over Iran
outlets.summary: War powers vote fails 214-213, third failed attempt. Only Rep. Golden crossed party lines. 60-day deadline approaching.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: Pakistan army chief lands in Tehran for US-Iran mediation talks
outlets.summary: Gen. Asim Munir delivering message from US to Iranian leadership. Pakistani officials expect major breakthrough on nuclear programme.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Hezbollah fires rockets at North Israel before cease-fire; three wounded, two severely
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports 10 rockets fired 2 hours before ceasefire. IDF intercepted 8. Three wounded. Hezbollah claims right to resist as long as Israeli troops remain.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Pentagon chiefs describe naval blockade as 13 ships turn back
outlets.summary: Liveblog covers Hegseth/Caine Pentagon briefing. 13 ships turned back. US ready to resume strikes. Netanyahu confirms ceasefire but no withdrawal.

outlets.name: NCRI
outlets.headline: Iran News in Brief — April 16, 2026
outlets.summary: NCRI covers internal Iranian developments including IRGC threats, Abdollahi shipping ultimatum, and economic pressures from blockade.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Pakistan army chief lands in Iran for mediation
outlets.summary: Iran International reports on Munir visit. Economy may take 12 years to rebuild. GDP forecast -6.1%. Rial at all-time low. Central bank warns of catastrophic damage.
